title: Go Hikari Lives
wikitext:
[]: Go Hikari! Lives Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 12, 2011 3:41 pm This thread is a consolidation/replacement of the image heavy threads Character X is Y! and similar. Let's keep the pretty images in this thread, and use them only to support the text in the other threads.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 12, 2011 3:48 pm Bumping with a picture of mai waifu

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 3:52 pm You bumped it seven minutes of its creation.... k den. Might as well contribute somehow.. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Apr 12, 2011 3:54 pm [URL=http://img219.imageshack.us/i/evangelionprops.jpg/] [/URL]

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Apr 12, 2011 3:58 pm :(

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:06 pm Stryker wrote: Edit: Just noticed all the Character X is Y topics are locked.

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:11 pm Well, I can't read. I should start working on posting all my Rei pics up...

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:44 pm B..but..but... This is a forum for casual discussion of Evangelion. Topics like "Asuka is hot!" or "Which Eva kicks the most ass?" belong here.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:53 pm Nothing wrong with starting a new casual discussion of whether Asuka is hot -- so long as the emphasis is on the discussion.

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 5:02 pm So.. you're saying that they were locked because they went off-topic.. when we thought they were on-topic? In my opinion, I think that is a rather poor excuse to lock the topics, instead of renaming them "Asuka's Hot Image Dump" or something... but that is assuming that the reason I stated was the reason.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Apr 12, 2011 5:09 pm Really, I agree that having a bunch of image dump threads is pretty pointless, I just found it amusingly ironic. Yes, ironic. Like rain on your wedding day. Shut up.

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Apr 12, 2011 5:22 pm esselfortium wrote: Really, I agree that having a bunch of image dump threads is pretty pointless.

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Apr 12, 2011 5:23 pm Now there is going to be Asuka in my Mari and Rei in my Asuka

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 12, 2011 6:11 pm I'm assuming screenshots are okay, not just fanart. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Tankred » Tue Apr 12, 2011 6:27 pm This was a great idea, Mr. Tines.

[]: Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 12, 2011 6:31 pm In regards to any commotion about the locking of your precious image threads: we at Evageeks like to emphasize that we are NOT an image board; we encourage intelligent discussion. That is to say, it's okay to have a few threads that are silly and nonsensical, but we have to draw some sort of line once the privilege is abused (AKA, multiple images threads appearing over the course of a month, and being the primary focus of traffic). Consider it a privilege that we've decided to organize them into one dump thread as opposed to banning them all outright. Remember: everything in moderation. EDIT: and my avatar has disappeared.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Apr 12, 2011 7:38 pm Dammit, this is gonna have way to many not sexy pictures for my intended purposes. I'm out.

[]: Post by Seen » Tue Apr 12, 2011 7:53 pm Stryker wrote: My OCD is raging at this post.

[]: Post by symbv » Tue Apr 12, 2011 8:21 pm Interesting idea. I can see the reason behind the locking and start of this thread. But shouldn't the title of this dedicated image dump thread be named something more indicative than "Go Hikari! Live"?

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 12, 2011 9:46 pm It was probably a shout out to this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5982 from 2004, archived from Anime Nation.
